rows.label: tev065801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Zo Zinath about the Larsians'
decision to leave the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Zo Zinath if anything
is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_SEL1021
rows.name:
Ask Zo Zinath if anything
is troubling him.

rows.label: tev065801_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Zo Zinath about recent developments.

rows.label: tev065801_SEL2031
rows.name: Ask Zo Zinath what he will do next.

rows.label: tev065801_SEL2041
rows.name: Ask Zo Zinath about recent developments.

rows.label: tev065801_MSG0001
rows.name:
The finest decision Prince
Jiarg has ever made! It lifted
the dark clouds on my heart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG0002
rows.name:
We had nothing and they had
everything, so we acquiesced
to their putrid wishes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG0003
rows.name:
But the valor and strength of the fierce Larsians
was never meant to serve feckless cowards like
them! Long did we struggle with the shame of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG0004
rows.name:
Now that we are free, we must
fend for ourselves, to be sure.
But we still know how to fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG0005
rows.name:
We will use these talents to
feed our people just as our
people did before this all began.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Our spies report suspicious activity
in a fortress of White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG0011
rows.name:
Had we resources, we would deal
with it forthwith— but it seems we
want for everything these days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG0012
rows.name:
Ah! Forget I spoke. This was not a
matter to bring before strangers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG1001
rows.name:
Thanks to the relief supplies
you sent us, we draw ever
closer to combat readiness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG1002
rows.name:
We will not remain on the defensive.
Once ready, we intend to strike first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG1003
rows.name:
Our spies report suspicious activity
in a fortress of White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG1004
rows.name:
Gi Nogan will go there first to secure the
perimeter, then we intend send in our
raiders. But do we have enough of them...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2001
rows.name:
We are still trying to make
sense of that schematic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2002
rows.name:
It appears to be a high-output Doll
weapon with range and power beyond
anything we have seen before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2003
rows.name:
Even if we did craft it, is there a Doll
in existence capable of wielding it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2004
rows.name:
If the Growth already have
such a Doll, then...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2005
rows.name:
Well, we must be ready for anything.
Let us keep our wits about us before
going into battle from now on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2010
rows.name:
One day I would like to build an
impregnable castle here like the
one we had on our homeworld.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2011
rows.name:
It would be just as magnificent
as your city of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2012
rows.name:
Then let us see the Growth throw
their might at us! We would sneer
as they turned tail and fled.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2013
rows.name: I cannot pursue this dream now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2014
rows.name:
But time changes much, and if I am patient,
the key to building my castle will present
itself. I must hold fast to the dream![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2019
rows.name:
It is purely conjecture, but I
believe I know the nature of
weapon this schematic describes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2020
rows.name:
It is a high-output weapon
designed specifically for the
mech that Luxaar was using.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2021
rows.name:
No other piece of machinery could possibly
wield something this formidable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2022
rows.name:
We were lucky to destroy Luxaar
before he could complete the weapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065801_MSG2023
rows.name:
It would have been an implement of
death in his hands. Even you might
not have emerged victorious.[ST:wait ]
